---
title: "License"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# License

Except where otherwise indicated, the materials in this repository are licensed under the:

## Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License

Under this license, the materials may be shared and adapted under the following conditions:

### Attribution

Appropriate credit must be provided, a link to the license must be included, and any modifications must be indicated.

### NonCommercial

The materials may not be used for commercial purposes.

### ShareAlike

Adapted materials must be distributed under the same license.

### No additional restrictions

No legal or technological restrictions may be applied that prevent others from exercising the rights granted by the license.

The complete license terms are available at:

[Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)

## Citation

When reusing the analytical workflow, data organization, figures, or tutorial materials, the repository and the associated manuscript should be cited.

## Third-party materials

Files or materials that contain a separate attribution, citation, or licensing statement remain subject to their original terms.
